recommendations.title: He's All That
recommendations.overview: To get revenge on her ex-boyfriend, an influencer attempts to transform an unpopular classmate into prom king.

recommendations.title: Mean Girls
recommendations.overview: Cady Heron is a hit with The Plastics, the A-list girl clique at her new school, until she makes the mistake of falling for Aaron Samuels, the ex-boyfriend of alpha Plastic Regina George.

recommendations.title: Magic Camp
recommendations.overview: Andy, at the urging of his former mentor and Magic Camp owner Roy Preston, returns to the camp of his youth hoping to reignite his career. Instead, he finds inspiration in his ragtag bunch of rookie magicians.

recommendations.title: Freaky Friday
recommendations.overview: Mother and daughter bicker over everything -- what Anna wears, whom she likes and what she wants to do when she's older. In turn, Anna detests Tess's fiancé. When a magical fortune cookie switches their personalities, they each get a peek at how the

recommendations.title: Mother of the Bride
recommendations.overview: Lana's daughter Emma returns from abroad and drops a bombshell: she's getting married. In Thailand. In a month! Things only get worse when Lana learns that the man who captured Emma's heart is the son of the man who broke hers years ago.

recommendations.title: The Spiderwick Chronicles
recommendations.overview: Upon moving into the run-down Spiderwick Estate with their mother, twin brothers Jared and Simon Grace, along with their sister Mallory, find themselves pulled into an alternate world full of faeries and other creatures.

recommendations.title: Just Like Heaven

recommendations.title: The House of Yes

recommendations.title: Mr. Popper's Penguins

recommendations.title: Head Over Heels
